responsibilities: Architect and build high-performance React components used at massive scale
Drive technical direction for the frontend within the squad
Collaborate with design systems team to evolve shared component library
Review code, mentor junior engineers, and establish engineering standards
Participate in on-call rotation (approximately 1 week per quarter)

mustHaveSkills.name: React
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Expert-level TypeScript and React (hooks, context, performance optimisation)

mustHaveSkills.name: Redux
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Experience with state management (Redux, Zustand, or similar)

mustHaveSkills.name: Jest
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Experience writing unit and integration tests (Jest, React Testing Library)

mustHaveSkills.name: Web APIs
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Solid understanding of browser rendering, Web APIs, and Core Web Vitals

niceToHaveSkills.name: Next.js
niceToHaveSkills.rawText: Experience with Next.js or similar SSR frameworks

workAuthorizationSignals: Must have full working rights in Australia (no visa sponsorship offered)
summary: Senior frontend role at Canva building the design editor at scale. Strong TypeScript/React required with state management experience. Hybrid 3 days Sydney CBD; no visa sponsorship.
